title: cryptanthus univittatus
intro: Cryptanthus univittatus, also known as the Zebra Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family that is native to Brazil. It is known for its unique, striped leaves that resemble the stripes of a zebra. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves of the Cryptanthus univittatus can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant benefits.
